headline: Matternet Appoints Sanjay Kotte to Board of Directors
summary: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., April 30, 2026--Matternet, the world's only FAA Type-Certified drone delivery platform, today announced that Sanjay Kotte, Chief Commercial Officer of Robinhood Money, has joined its Board of Directors. Mr. Kotte was previously Head of Strategic Partnerships at DoorDash, where for nearly seven years he signed and scaled global restaurant partnerships that helped grow the business into a leading on-demand delivery platform. His extensive experience building enterprise-scale
